## Roadmap Scope

## Validation

- [ ] Meson build/test run or reason it was not applicable.
- [ ] Relevant CLI command or smoke test run.
- [ ] Docs/help text updated for behavior, options, formats, dependencies, or setup changes.
- [ ] Accessibility/localization impact checked.
- [ ] AI-free path preserved for core workflows.

## Credits And Licensing

- [ ] README Credits and `docs/CREDITS.md` updated for borrowed code, docs, algorithms, specs, UI patterns, or assets.
- [ ] Upstream license headers/copyright notices preserved where applicable.
- [ ] `docs/DEPENDENCIES.md` updated for new or changed libraries.
- [ ] External compiler/toolchain changes documented in `docs/COMPILER_INTEGRATION.md`.
